meaning: n.港口,舱门,左舷,避风港,枪眼vt.左转舵,持(枪)vi.转舵左n.端口
examples: The port is quiet and unspoiled.
The ship spent four days in port.
Out of this port-hopping, footloose milieu stepped the most influential traveller in Western history.
Schedules are not publicised, so you will need to ask at the port in Papeete.
